REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-02-2008 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON OCT-04-2011 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT REACHED BY THE PARTIES WAS READ INTO THE RECORD BY DAVID J. COOK, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LETICIA PEREZ, CSR #7782.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVILA, RICHARD G. , AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HELWEE, JOHN , AN INDIVIDUAL (UNDER CCP 664.6). IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT AVILA SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER JUDGMENT TO AND AGAINST HELWEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $14,000, INCLUSIVE OF PRINCIPAL, INTEREST, COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES, AND THAT INTEREST SHALL ACCRUE THEREON FROM JUNE 2, 2008 AT 10% PER ANNUM UNTIL PAID. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS OF THE JUDGMENT.
